commands.review_summary:
This PR replaces hardcoded tray/node handshake versions with AppVersionInfo, adds node-only startup reconnect for persisted NodeDeviceToken installs, rewrites exec approval prompts as a native Win32 window with fallback, and adds regression coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection and the PR body’s live pre-patch probe: current master requires an operator credential during startup and has no node-only reconnect fallback when only NodeDeviceToken is persisted. I did not run a Windows live repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is indicated; maintainer or author runtime validation is needed for the auth-sensitive reconnect and native approval prompt paths.

target.title: fix(node): reconnect and report app version after restart
target.body:
## Summary
- replace hardcoded `1.0.0` Windows node/tray handshake version fields with `AppVersionInfo.Version`
- add a node-only startup reconnect path for already-paired Windows nodes that only have a persisted `NodeDeviceToken`
- preserve no-downgrade credential precedence, including SSH-tunnel startup and legacy root identity fallback
- add regression coverage for node-only reconnect, SSH tunnel startup, and startup fallback wiring

## Validation
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean after accepting two P2 findings
- Azure live probe before this patch reproduced the restart bug: pending stayed 0 and paired stayed 4, but `connectedCount` dropped to 0 after tray restart because startup had missing/non-durable credentials
- blocked locally: this macOS pane and the current Windows crabboxes do not have `dotnet`; CI is running the Windows/C# validation for the pushed draft branch

## Remaining Goal Work
- install a CI-built patched binary on a crabbox and rerun tray restart, Windows reboot, and Linux gateway restart identity checks
- run the real interactive exec approval path: deny, allow once, allow always, and stale/drift protection
target.author: vincentkoc
